title: Robust Brazilian Deodeok Root Skewers
description: A fresh and juicy Brazilian dish featuring deodeok root, double fried for a crispy exterior and a tender interior, perfect for a brunch mood, and plant based friendly.

ingredients.name: deodeok root
ingredients.notes: peeled and cut into 1 inch pieces

instructions: Preheat the oil in a deep frying pan to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, mix together the flour, cornstarch, smoked paprika, garlic powder, salt, and black pepper.
Add the deodeok root pieces to the bowl and toss to coat evenly with the flour mixture.
Double fry the deodeok root pieces by frying them for 3 minutes, then removing them from the oil and letting them cool for 30 seconds, and then frying them again for an additional 2 minutes.
Thread the fried deodeok root pieces onto skewers.
Serve the skewers hot and enjoy.
Garnish with chopped fresh parsley or cilantro if desired.
Serve with a side of your favorite dipping sauce.
